name: Putin Jigsaw
short_description: Putin jigsaw is jigsaw puzzle game with Putin themed images
detailed_description:
Putin jigsaw is puzzle jigsaw game with puzzles and images from president Putin and his friends. This is a logical game in which the goal of the game is to rearrange the tiles to get the final picture. Puzzle game contains 67images and can you be the lawnmower genious and solve all jigsaw puzzles
Different sized jigsaws, so be the hero and solve all jigsaws and collect steam achievements

Key features of the game:

- 7 jigsaws for now
- Steam achievements
- Different sized jigsaw images

Buttons:

- Mouse to move jigsaws
- R = Restart game
- Escape= quit game
